scripts.build: tsx scripts/check-production-env.ts && tsx scripts/check-no-synthetic-imports.ts && tsx scripts/check-client-node-imports.ts && tsx scripts/check-no-em-dashes.ts && tsx scripts/copy-data-to-public.ts && tsx scripts/build-overview-insights.ts && tsx scripts/build-overview-drilldowns.ts && tsx scripts/build-overview-snapshot.ts && tsx scripts/verify-data-integrity.ts && tsx scripts/audit-card-consistency.ts && tsx scripts/audit-metric-semantics.ts && tsx scripts/audit-ci-artifact-contract.ts && tsx scripts/check-deploy-readiness.ts && node scripts/next-build-retry.mjs

scripts.upload: tsx scripts/copy-data-to-public.ts && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
